---
title: "a53: TSDoc API Reference"
---

<!-- generated by scripts/project-docs-site.mjs; edit docs/decisions/a53-tsdoc-api-reference.md -->

## Situation

API contract facts currently live in public exports, source types, package
manifests, and hand-authored `docs/api/*.md`. That makes markdown a parallel
source of API truth and forces every export change to update prose tables by
hand.

## Options

- Keep `docs/api/*.md` as the API fact source.
- Generate API reference from exported symbols and TSDoc while package docs
  stay narrative.
- Delete API reference until every package has complete TSDoc.

## Decision

a53 should move API facts to source exports plus TSDoc. Generated API reference
and `PUBLIC_API.md` pages become projections. Every exported public symbol must
have one status tag such as `@public`, `@experimental`, `@internal`, or
`@deprecated`. Exported symbols without TSDoc fail the public API check after
their package enters the migration set.

The pilot package is `@agent-os/attached-stream` because it is small and new.
Migration then proceeds by package group instead of rewriting the whole repo in
one step.

## Kill Criterion

If the pilot requires package-specific parser exceptions for ordinary TypeScript
exports, stop and redesign the API generator before migrating a second package.
If two exported-symbol changes require hand-editing generated API markdown,
delete the manual path and make the generator the only writer before continuing.

## Revisit

Revisit when the attached-stream API page is generated and `check:public-api`
can prove TSDoc presence, status tags, generated markdown currency, and export
manifest agreement for that package.
